## 验证

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run release:check`
- [ ] `npm run build:app`
- [ ] `MOBILE_PREFLIGHT_REQUIRE_BUILD=1 npm run mobile:preflight`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build:h5`
- [ ] `npm run desktop:smoke`
- [ ] `npm run release:summary`
- [ ] `npm run real-user:packet`
- [ ] `npm run qa:staging`
- [ ] 真机登录和核心流程回归
